metadata.title: Naya Pakistan Certificate | Islamic Certificate | INPC | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate (INPC) is a Shariah-compliant investment option that is offered to Meezan Roshan Digital & Meezan Roshan Resident Account holders on the basis of Mudarabah. We are pleased to be the only dedicated Islamic bank offering INPC.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate Invest in a Certificate If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print ISLAMIC NAYA PAKISTAN CERTIFICATES (INPCs) For Non-Resident & Resident Pakistanis (with declared assets abroad) Naya Pakistan Certificate (INPC) is a Shariah-compliant investment option that is offered to Meezan Roshan Digital & Meezan Roshan Resident Account holders on the basis of Mudarabah. This initiative - led by State Bank of Pakistan (SBP), offers investors an opportunity to contribute towards economic growth and prosperity in Pakistan by offering lucrative investment options to Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) and resident (with declared assets abroad). Bank of Pakistan (SBP) is the sole custodian of Naya Pakistan Certificate while Meezan Bank is acting as an agent to the same. Features Tenure of Investment Investments are offered for 3 months, 6 months, 12 months, 3 years and 5 years tenure. Currency of Investment Certificates are available in PKR, USD, GBP & EUR denominations. (Resident Pakistanis can only invest in GBP & EUR denominated certificates) Minimum Investment PKR Denominated Certificates : Minimum investment of 10,000 and 1,000 multiples thereon. GBP & EUR Minimum investment of 1,000 and 500 multiples thereon. in a Certificate Underlying Islamic Mode Investors will enter into a Mudarabah contract for investment of their funds in Shariah-compliant INPCs with the INPC Company Limited. The investors are Rab-ul Maal and INPC Company Limited is the Mudarib. Profit & Loss Mechanism The INPC Company Limited (Mudarib), will share the profit with investors the basis of a predetermined percentage of the distributable profit of the business, called PSR (Profit Sharing Ratio). All the investors will be assigned weightages based on the features of the INPC held by them, such as tenure, profit payment options and other applicable features for the purpose of calculation of profit. The PSR & weightages applicable to all INPCs will be announced every month. Shariah Approval Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate’s product structure, underlying agreements and terms & conditions are approved by both Shariah Advisory Committee of Bank of Pakistan and Shariah Board of Meezan Bank Limited. Profit Payment Frequency Tenure Profit Payment 3 Months At maturity 6 Months At maturity 12 Months At maturity 3 Years Bi-Annually 5 Years Bi-Annually How the Naya Pakistan Certificate Works Profit Sharing Ratio (PSR) for the Month of March 2026 Denominated Certificates Islamic NPC (as Mudarib) Investors/Customers (as Rab-ul-Maal) PKR 35% of the distributable income 65% the distributable income USD 55% the distributable income 45% the distributable income GBP the distributable income the distributable income EUR 70% the distributable income 30% the distributable income Weightages & Expected Return of March 2026 PKR Denominated Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificates Tenure For Denominated INPC PKR INPC-IV Denomination Expected Return*(% per annum) Weightage Assigned 3 Months – Profit payment at Maturity 10.75 0.77 6 payment at Maturity 11.00 0.79 12 Maturity 11.00 0.79 3 Years – Profit payment Bi-Annually 11.25 0.81 5 Profit payment Bi-Annually 11.50 0.83 Bank's Investment in the pool 6.75 0.68 USD For Denominated INPC USD INPC-IV Denomination USD INPC-V annum) Weightage Assigned payment at Maturity 5.50 0.78 6.75 0.96 Maturity 5.50 0.78 7.00 0.99 payment at Maturity 5.75 0.81 7.25 1.03 Profit payment Bi-Annually 6.00 0.85 7.50 1.06 Profit payment Bi-Annually 6.25 0.89 7.75 1.10 in the pool - - 4.25 0.60 GBP For Denominated INPC GBP INPC-IV Denomination GBP 5.50 0.78 6.75 0.95 5.75 0.81 7.25 1.02 payment at Maturity 0.85 7.50 1.06 payment Bi-Annually 6.25 0.88 7.75 1.09 Profit payment Bi-Annually 6.50 0.92 8.00 1.13 pool - - 4.75 0.67 EUR For Denominated INPC EUR INPC-IV Denomination EUR payment at Maturity 3.50 0.76 4.75 1.02 payment at Maturity 3.75 0.81 5.25 1.13 payment at Maturity 4.00 0.86 5.50 1.19 Profit payment Bi-Annually 4.50 0.97 6.00 1.29 Profit payment Bi-Annually 4.75 1.02 6.25 1.35 pool - - 2.50 0.54 Consolidated Weightages *Note :As per the rules of Mudarabah, expected rates should not be considered as profit rate confirmation or guarantee. Expected profit rates are given to provide an idea to the investors. Actual profit rates will be calculated in line with the Islamic principle of Mudarabah, based on the actual financials of the month. PKR INPC-I :Applicable on Fresh Bookings from 1st October, 2022 USD/GBP/EUR Fresh Bookings from 23 January, 2023 INPC-II Fresh Bookings from 10 October, 2023 INPC-III Fresh Bookings from March 06, 2025 INPC-IV Fresh Bookings from February 25, 2026 INPC-V Bookings from March 27, 2026 Actual Profit the Month of January Denominated INPC PKR Denomination PKR INPC-I Denomination PKR INPC-II Denomination PKR INPC-III Denomination Actual Return(% per annum) Return(% per annum) payment at Maturity - - - 13.50 - - 13.50 Maturity - - 21.50 13.00 Profit payment Bi-Annually - 14.00 17.50 12.50 Profit payment Bi-Annually 11.00 13.50 15.00 12.50 in the pool 9.50 9.50 9.50 9.50 Denominated INPC USD Denomination USD-I Denomination USD-II Denomination USD-III - - - 7.00 - - 7.00 Maturity - - 9.00 7.00 Profit payment Bi-Annually 6.75 8.00 8.00 7.50 Profit payment Bi-Annually 7.00 8.00 8.00 7.50 in the pool 4.50 4.50 4.50 4.50 Denominated INPC GBP Denomination GBP-I Denomination GBP-II Denomination GBP-III - - - 7.25 - - 7.25 Maturity - - 8.00 7.25 payment Bi-Annually - 7.50 7.50 payment Bi-Annually 6.50 7.50 7.50 in the pool 5.25 5.25 5.25 5.25 Denominated INPC EUR Denomination EUR-I Denomination EUR-II Denomination EUR-III - - - 5.25 - - 5.25 Maturity - - 7.00 5.25 Profit payment Bi-Annually 5.50 6.50 6.50 5.25 Profit payment Bi-Annually 5.75 6.50 6.50 5.25 in the pool 3.00 3.00 3.00 3.00 Historical Profit Rates 10 October, 2023 The profit on INPCs will be subject to deduction of tax in accordance with the applicable laws. Investment requests of INPCs (PKR & USD) received within the cut-off time of 1:00 pm Pakistan Standard Time (PST) shall be invested on the same day. Requests received after Standard Time (PST) will invested on the next working day subject to availability of funds in investor’s account. Investment requests of (GBP & EUR) denominated certificates received till 1:00 pm (PST) shall be booked the next working day's value date. For the Holy Month of Ramadan, INPC Investment requests & USD) received before 11:45 AM PST (Monday to Thursday) and 10:30 AM PST (For Friday) will be processed the same day. certificates received till PST (For Friday) day's value date. Procedure for Periodic Payments Payment of profits earned against (INPCs) shall be made on 6-months basis. It will be applicable on INPCs of 3-years and 5-years maturities. Profit payments shall be determined from the date of issuance of the certificates. For example: if certificates are issued on November 10, 2020, the profit payments be made on May 10, 2021 and on subsequent 6-monthly dates accordingly. In case of a holiday on the periodic profit or principal payment date, next working day falling after the holiday will be considered the periodic profit date/principal payment date. In such a case, no profit will be payable for the period of the holidays. Premature Encashment Certificate holders can make early redemption/premature encashment of their INPCs after one month of issuance. Profit/proceeds for premature encashment request made after one month and before three months will be redeemed at a discounted price by applying a discount in the profit rates for that category. Profit/proceeds of premature encashment made after three months shall be worked out based on the weightages applicable to the nearest completed tenures.
